positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical circular design featuring a majestic blend of celestial and botanical elements. The central motif is a stylized crescent moon nestled within outstretched, symmetrical laurel branches and delicate silver-leafed ferns. Subtle, swirling nebulae patterns fade into the edges, framed by a minimalist golden ring. The composition uses strong black outlines and deep teal, cosmic purple, and metallic gold accents. Style is Art Deco meets celestial engraving, suitable for a clean, high-contrast textile print. Perfect for a central chest graphic.
negative: blurry, low quality, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, graffiti, messy, dirty, poor composition, artifacts, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad lines
